## Diagram 2

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant Main
    participant SparkContext
    participant SQLContext
    participant PostgreSQL
    participant S3
    
    Main->>SparkContext: Initialize with YARN
    Main->>SparkContext: Configure settings
    Main->>SQLContext: Initialize SQLContext
    Main->>SQLContext: Set legacy config
    Main->>SQLContext: Read JDBC format
    SQLContext->>PostgreSQL: Connect and query table
    PostgreSQL-->>SQLContext: Return data as DataFrame
    SQLContext-->>Main: DataFrame df
    Main->>S3: Write df as Parquet (overwrite)
    Main->>SQLContext: Read back from S3
    SQLContext->>S3: Read Parquet
    S3-->>SQLContext: Return DataFrame df2
    SQLContext-->>Main: DataFrame df2
    Main->>Main: get_latest_path()
    Main->>S3: Write df2 to latest path (overwrite)
```

## Diagram 3

```mermaid
graph LR
    A[get_latest_path] --> A1[Split path by /]
    A1 --> A2[Remove version timestamp]
    A2 --> A3[Rejoin path]
    
    B[extract_from_id_query] --> B1[Extract table short name]
    B1 --> B2[Build SQL query with WHERE id]
    
    C[get_last_id] --> C1[Aggregate max id]
    C1 --> C2{Success?}
    C2 -->|Yes| C3[Return max_id]
    C2 -->|No| C4[Return None]
    
    D[main] --> D1[Initialize Spark]
    D1 --> D2[Read from PostgreSQL]
    D2 --> D3[Write to versioned S3 path]
    D3 --> D4[Read back from S3]
    D4 --> D5[Write to latest S3 path]
```
